name: @absolutejs/agent-conformance
description: Provider-neutral adversarial conformance for agent security plus A2A, MCP, Arazzo, and WebMCP standards.
author: Alex Kahn

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts src/manifest.ts --outdir dist --root src --sourcemap --target=bun --external @absolutejs/manifest --external @sinclair/typebox && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && absolute-manifest emit
scripts.check:package: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.release: bun run format && bun run check:package && bun publish
